title: Wilderness Planecrash
description: After a terrible accident, you have crashlanded in a place that does not seem to welcome you. You can hear the many animalistic noises coming from the woods. You won't be saved anytime soon, so it's time to survive on your own.
body:
# Wilderness Planecrash by Forge Labs ![Forge Labs Divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f83f327701a64468e9152ecf2450c0ef1be54a3f.png)
You are unsure of what happend the last time you were awake. You were on a plane heading to your destination when suddenly a critical failure broke down the wings of said plane. After a lot of tumbling and screaming, you got knocked out. Now you are awake once more, surrounded by the broken pieces of the accident when you suddenly hear many animalistic noises coming from the woods. It seems you aren't alone..
![Forge Labs Divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f83f327701a64468e9152ecf2450c0ef1be54a3f.png)
![Forge Labs Divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f83f327701a64468e9152ecf2450c0ef1be54a3f.png)
### Notice #### THE MAP SEEN IN THE VIDEO IS AVAILABLE FOR DOWNLOAD OVER AT [PATREON!](https://www.patreon.com/ForgeLabs) It is recommended that you allocate 6GB of RAM to Minecraft if you intend to use shaders with this modpack
![Forge Labs Divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f83f327701a64468e9152ecf2450c0ef1be54a3f.png)
